business.name: Dave's Lock & Key
business.tagline: Keys made, locks opened, problems solved

hero.headline: Locked out? *Dave's got you covered*
hero.subheadline: Quick service with personality — the locksmith Clarksville calls when they need it done right.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every lock, every key, every problem
services_section.subheading: From car keys to home security — one call handles it all

services.title: Emergency Lockouts
services.description: Locked out of your car or home? Fast response to get you back in.

services.title: Key Duplication
services.description: Car keys, house keys, specialty keys — made on the spot.

services.title: Lock Installation & Repair
services.description: New locks for your doors or fixing the ones that won't turn.

services.title: Key Fob Programming
services.description: Car key fobs repaired and programmed — no dealer needed.

about.heading: Dave keeps it real
about.body: A Clarksville locksmith who shows up fast and gets the job done. Straight talk, fair prices, and you'll probably laugh a little too.

reviews.name: Esperanza L.
reviews.text: Dave was at our house in under an hour. Amazing customer service and kept us laughing. Made a duplicate truck key in 30 minutes.

reviews.name: Nicole J.
reviews.text: Called expecting a long wait but he said 15 minutes and was there in 5! Got me in my car in less than a minute.

reviews.name: Kirin C.
reviews.text: Fixed my car key fob super quick, even gave me extra pins for future repairs. Other locksmiths said I needed a specialist — Dave handled it.

cta.heading: Locked out? Key broke? Need new locks?
cta.body: One call gets Dave on the way. Fast service, fair prices, and you'll get back to your day.
